Jeffrey R. Cluett, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF KAREN Y. UCHIYAMA 274-2033, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT GARY GILLESPIE'S Motion To Strike Entire First Amended Complaint Or In The Alternative Portions Thereof -- Granted as to the entire amended complaint. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
